scripts.preinstall: node -e "require('fs').existsSync('package-lock.json') && require('fs').unlinkSync('package-lock.json'); require('fs').existsSync('yarn.lock') && require('fs').unlinkSync('yarn.lock'); const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
